summary: The diff implements all three requirements (REQ-15, REQ-16, REQ-17) for fixing Web Serial API permissions policy errors. The implementation includes: (1) a new .ic-assets.json5 configuration file adding the Permissions-Policy header with serial=(self), (2) enhanced error handling in useWebSerial.ts with secure context validation and user-friendly error messages, and (3) improved ConnectionPanel.tsx UI displaying context-aware error alerts with actionable guidance.
